title: pertya rigidula
intro: Pertya rigidula, also known as the Philippine golden ragwort, is a flowering plant species in the dandelion family that is native to the Philippines and other parts of Southeast Asia. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Pertya rigidula include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help to reduce inflammation and protect against cell damage. Pertya rigidula can be prepared as a tea or infusion by steeping the leaves and flowers in hot water, or it can be dried and used in herbal capsules or tablets.
